name: runZero
description: Network discovery and asset inventory platform combining active scanning, passive monitoring, and cloud integration to provide comprehensive visibility of all network-connected assets

actions.name: List Assets
actions.description: Export discovered assets with their services, software, and vulnerability information

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search query to filter assets (e.g., 'type:server AND os:linux')

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include

actions.name: Get Asset Details
actions.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific asset by ID

parameters.name: asset_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the asset

actions.name: List Services
actions.description: Export discovered network services across all assets

actions.name: List Sites
actions.description: Retrieve configured sites (network segments) in the organization

actions.name: List Scans
actions.description: Retrieve scan tasks and their execution status

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search query to filter scan tasks

actions.name: Start Scan
actions.description: Launch a new network discovery scan for a specific site

parameters.name: site_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the site to scan

parameters.name: targets
parameters.description: Target IP ranges or CIDRs for the scan

actions.name: List Wireless Assets
actions.description: Export discovered wireless network assets and access points

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search query to filter wireless assets

actions.name: Search Assets by Domain
actions.description: Search for assets associated with specific domains
